arts.ttl: West Ham 2-5 Arsenal: Mikel Arteta's men equal 87-year-old Man City goalscoring record
arts.sum: Arsenal equal an English football goalscoring record last achieved by Manchester City in 1937 with their 5-2 Premier League drubbing of London rivals West Ham United.
